title: Create Ultimine
description: A Create mod addon that supports FTB Ultimine functionality
body:
Create Ultimine is a Quality of Life mod that supports Create interactions with FTB Ultimine.

## Features
The following features are supported through Ultimine:

- Supports manual applications (andesite alloy, brass ingot, copper ingot, and sturdy ingot on stripped logs / casing etc.).
- Supports wrench (shift) right-click interaction to Create blocks / Minecrat redstone-related blocks.
  - This includes destruction, rotation, and other interactions.
